info.title: GTA Car Generator Import Tool
info.description: Imports car generators from a JSON file into a GTA3/VC savedata file.

options.name: --replace
options.description:
Replace the entire car generator pool instead of individual items. Note: this
will overwrite all car generators.

options.name: --title
options.description: Set the in-game title of the savefile.

options.name: --export
options.description: Export car generators instead of importing. Ignores -r and -t.

options.name: --game
options.description: (Default: GTA3) Select the game to work with. Valid values: GTA3, VC
